roa.docketEntryComment: PEOPLE'S SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEFING REGARDING VICTIM RESTITUTION FILED

/CAL:BIFURCATED RESTITUTION HEARING/WIT SWORN DA: YU MEI LEI/X:THE WITNESS TESTIFIES WITH THE ASSISTANCE OF COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER NORA YUEDA, OATH ON FILE,/EXHMA: PEO 1 - 8 PAGE 'VERIOZON' PHONE BILL/CTORD:THE FOLLOWING BREAKDOWN IS WHAT SHALL BE GRANTED, DENIED & HAS BEEN PAID (AS DENOTED):/X:FUNERAL COSTS - $7,825,50 IS GRANTED/X:BURIAL PLOT & LABOR- $11,020,00 IS GRANTED/X:PHOTOGRAPHS OF FUNERAL - $100,00 IS GRANTED/X:TOMBSTONE REPLACEMENT  -$3,245,00 IS GRANTED/X:EXCESS PHONE BILL RELATED TO THE FUNERAL - $318,77 IS GRANTED/X:LOST WAGES ARE DENIED AS RESTITUTION//X:LUCKY MONEY IS DENIED AS RESTITUTION/X:MEDICAL CLAIMS - $14,110,00 AREALREADY SATISFIED BY INSURANCE/X:THE DEFENDANT'S INSURANCE HAS PAID $6486,15 TO THE VICTIM,S FAMILY/CTORD:TOTAL AMOUNT DETERMINED FOR RESTITUTION TOTALS $22,509,27,  MINUS THE INSURANCE $6,486,15 LEAVES THE DEFNEDANT LIABLEFOR RESTITUTION IN THE AMOUNT OF $16,023,12/CTORD:ANY CR-110'S & 111'S CAN BE PREPARED BY APD PRIOR TO THE  TERMINATION OF DEFENDANT'S PROBATION/X:EXHIBITS MARKED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE, ARE ORDERED RETURNED/X:TO THEOFFERING PARTY PENDING FURTHER ORDER OF COURT,/
